jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at 99acres - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? 99acres in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 99acres:
99acres is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres!
